reason: All five verification points hold: pipeline.py fan_out=6 < 8 and core community size=7 < 50 → neither Orchestrator false-positive threshold met → no DA waiver required. infra.config fan_in=8 satisfies HUB_HIGH_FAN_IN >= 8 → advisory fires. compute_hub_risk_map code confirms severity = 'high' if untested else 'medium' for fan_in in [8,15) — matching SAD text. Hub advisory findings are explicitly non-scoring per evaluate_dimension.md §advisory findings.
citations: crg_analysis.py:243-246 — severity ladder: fan_in>=HUB_CRITICAL_FAN_IN → critical/high; fan_in>=HUB_HIGH_FAN_IN → high/medium
evaluate_dimension.md:296-297 — Detection requires list_communities size > 50 AND fan_out > 8 (both conditions)
evaluate_dimension.md:84-89 — hub advisory findings do NOT change tool-scored coverage percentage
SAD.md §5.2 — pipeline fan_out=6, core size=7, both < threshold
SAD.md §5.2 — infra.config fan_in=8, 8 sibling imports listed
